[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100100101 4
1 110111000 5
2 110110000 4
3 110100100 4
4 100101110 5
5 111001011 6
6 011101100 5
7 100011011 5

01 10 111110111 8
12 21 011100101 5
23 32 001101100 4
34 43 010111110 6
45 54 011111111 8
56 65 011111111 8
67 76 011110101 6
70 07 100110111 6

02 20 101010111 6
13 31 011101101 6
24 42 011011110 6
35 53 001101111 6
46 64 011011111 7
57 75 001111111 7
60 06 111010011 6
71 17 011110101 6

03 30 100111011 6
14 41 011111111 8
25 52 001101111 6
36 63 011111001 6
47 74 010111110 6
50 05 101111111 8
61 16 011110101 6
72 27 001110100 4

04 40 110011111 7
15 51 011101111 7
26 62 011010101 5
37 73 000111100 4
